name: portfolio-monorepo
description: Root monorepo scripts for running the portfolio, learning hub, and developer profile.

scripts.dev:all: npm run build:learning && npm run build:profile && mkdir -p apps/portfolio/web/learning apps/portfolio/web/profile && cp -R apps/learning/dist/* apps/portfolio/web/learning/ && cp -R apps/profile/dist/* apps/portfolio/web/profile/ && npm run dev:portfolio
